revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Hidden|header=Hornbostel-Sachs musical instrument templates ({{navbar|Template:Musical instrument templates|plain=1}})|content=</includeonly><noinclude>{{pad|4em}}'''Hornbostel-Sachs musical instrument templates'''
</noinclude>{{div col|colwidth=20em}}
*{{tl|Musical instruments}}
*{{tl|Hornbostel-Sachs}}
*1 {{tl|Idiophones}}
**11 {{tl|Struck idiophones}}
***111 {{tl|Directly struck idiophones}}
****111.1 {{tl|Concussion idiophones}}
****111.2 {{tl|Percussion idiophones}}
*****111.21 {{tl|Stick percussion idiophones}}
*****111.22 {{tl|Plaque percussion idiophones}} ({{tl|Lithophones}})
***112 {{tl|Indirectly struck idiophones}}
****112.1 {{tl|Shaken idiophones}}
****112.2 {{tl|Scraped idiophones}}
**12 {{tl|Plucked idiophones}}
**13 {{tl|Friction idiophones}}
**14 {{tl|Blown idiophones}}
*2 {{tl|Membranophones}}
**21 {{tl|Struck membranophones}}
***211 {{tl|Directly struck membranophones}}
****211.1 {{tl|Kettle drums}}
****211.2 {{tl|Tubular drums}}
****211.3 {{tl|Frame drums}}
***212 {{tl|Indirectly struck membranophones}}
**22 {{tl|Plucked membranophones}}
***221 {{tl|Frame plucked membranophones}}
***222 {{tl|Comb plucked membranophones}}
**23 {{tl|Friction membranophones}}
***231 {{tl|Stick friction membranophones}}
***232 {{tl|Chord friction membranophones}}
***233 {{tl|Hand friction membranophones}}
**24 {{tl|Blown membranophones}}
***241 {{tl|Free blown membranophones}}
***241 {{tl|Vessel blown membranophones}}
*3 {{tl|Chordophones}}
**31 {{tl|Simple chordophones}} ({{tl|Zithers}})
***311 {{tl|Bar or stick zithers}}
***312 {{tl|Tube zithers}}
***313 {{tl|Raft zithers}}
***314 {{tl|Board zithers}}
***315 {{tl|Trough zithers}}
***316 {{tl|Frame zithers}}
**32 {{tl|Composite chordophones}}
***321 {{tl|Lutes}}
***322 {{tl|Harps}}
***323 {{tl|Harp lutes}}
*4 {{tl|Aerophones}}
**41 {{tl|Free aerophones}}
***411 {{tl|Displacement aerophones}}
***412 {{tl|Interruptive aerophones}}
****412.132 Sets of free reeds {{tl|Squeezebox}}
***413 {{tl|Plosive aerophones}}
**42 {{tl|Non-free aerophones}}
***421 {{tl|Flutes}}
****421.121.12 {{tl|Western concert flutes}}
****421.221.11 {{tl|Whistles}}
***422 {{tl|Reed aerophones}}
****422.1 {{tl|Double reed}}
****422.2 {{tl|Single reeds}}
****422.3 {{tl|Free reeds}}
***423 {{tl|Brass aerophones}}
****423.1 {{tl|Natural brass aerophones}}
****423.2 {{tl|Chromatic brass aerophones}}
*5 {{tl|Electrophones}}
*{{tl|HS number}}
*See also: {{tl|Elemental organology}} ({{tl|Crystallophones}}, <nowiki>{{</nowiki>[[Template:Water instruments|Hydraulophones]]<nowiki>}}</nowiki>)
{{Div col end}}<includeonly>}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Hidden|header=Hornbostel-Sachs musical instrument templates ({{navbar|Template:Musical instrument templates|plain=1}})|content=</includeonly><noinclude>{{pad|4em}}'''Hornbostel-Sachs musical instrument templates'''
</noinclude>{{div col|colwidth=20em}}
*{{tl|Musical instruments}}
*{{tl|Hornbostel-Sachs}}
*1 {{tl|Idiophones}}
**11 {{tl|Struck idiophones}}
***111 {{tl|Directly struck idiophones}}
****111.1 {{tl|Concussion idiophones}}
****111.2 {{tl|Percussion idiophones}}
*****111.21 {{tl|Stick percussion idiophones}}
*****111.22 {{tl|Plaque percussion idiophones}} ({{tl|Lithophones}})
***112 {{tl|Indirectly struck idiophones}}
****112.1 {{tl|Shaken idiophones}}
****112.2 {{tl|Scraped idiophones}}
**12 {{tl|Plucked idiophones}}
**13 {{tl|Friction idiophones}}
**14 {{tl|Blown idiophones}}
*2 {{tl|Membranophones}}
**21 {{tl|Struck membranophones}}
***211 {{tl|Directly struck membranophones}}
****211.1 {{tl|Kettle drums}}
****211.2 {{tl|Tubular drums}}
****211.3 {{tl|Frame drums}}
***212 {{tl|Indirectly struck membranophones}}
**22 {{tl|Plucked membranophones}}
***221 {{tl|Frame plucked membranophones}}
***222 {{tl|Comb plucked membranophones}}
**23 {{tl|Friction membranophones}}
***231 {{tl|Stick friction membranophones}}
***232 {{tl|Chord friction membranophones}}
***233 {{tl|Hand friction membranophones}}
**24 {{tl|Blown membranophones}}
***241 {{tl|Free blown membranophones}}
***241 {{tl|Vessel blown membranophones}}
*3 {{tl|Chordophones}}
**31 {{tl|Simple chordophones}} ({{tl|Zithers}})
***311 {{tl|Bar or stick zithers}}
***312 {{tl|Tube zithers}}
***313 {{tl|Raft zithers}}
***314 {{tl|Board zithers}}
***315 {{tl|Trough zithers}}
***316 {{tl|Frame zithers}}
**32 {{tl|Composite chordophones}}
***321 {{tl|Lutes}}
***322 {{tl|Harps}}
***323 {{tl|Harp lutes}}
*4 {{tl|Aerophones}}
**41 {{tl|Free aerophones}}
***411 {{tl|Displacement aerophones}}
***412 {{tl|Interruptive aerophones}}
****412.132 Sets of free reeds {{tl|Squeezebox}}
***413 {{tl|Plosive aerophones}}
**42 {{tl|Non-free aerophones}}
***421 {{tl|Flutes}}
****421.121.12 {{tl|Western concert flutes}}
****421.221.11 {{tl|Whistles}}
***422 {{tl|Reed aerophones}}
****422.1 {{tl|Double reed}}
****422.2 {{tl|Single reeds}}
****422.3 {{tl|Free reeds}}
***423 {{tl|Brass aerophones}}
****423.1 {{tl|Natural brass aerophones}}
****423.2 {{tl|Chromatic brass aerophones}}
*5 {{tl|Electrophones}}
*{{tl|HS number}}
*See also: {{tl|Elemental organology}} ({{tl|Crystallophones}}, <nowiki>{{</nowiki>[[Template:Water instruments|Hydraulophones]]<nowiki>}}</nowiki>)
{{Div col end}}<includeonly>}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Hidden|header=Hornbostel-Sachs musical instrument templates ({{navbar|Template:Musical instrument templates|plain=1}})|content=</includeonly><noinclude>{{pad|4em}}'''Hornbostel-Sachs musical instrument templates'''
</noinclude>{{div col|colwidth=20em}}
*{{tl|Musical instruments}}
*{{tl|Hornbostel-Sachs}}
*1 {{tl|Idiophones}}
**11 {{tl|Struck idiophones}}
***111 {{tl|Directly struck idiophones}}
****111.1 {{tl|Concussion idiophones}}
****111.2 {{tl|Percussion idiophones}}
*****111.21 {{tl|Stick percussion idiophones}}
*****111.22 {{tl|Plaque percussion idiophones}} ({{tl|Lithophones}})
***112 {{tl|Indirectly struck idiophones}}
****112.1 {{tl|Shaken idiophones}}
****112.2 {{tl|Scraped idiophones}}
**12 {{tl|Plucked idiophones}}
**13 {{tl|Friction idiophones}}
**14 {{tl|Blown idiophones}}
*2 {{tl|Membranophones}}
**21 {{tl|Struck membranophones}}
***211 {{tl|Directly struck membranophones}}
****211.1 {{tl|Kettle drums}}
****211.2 {{tl|Tubular drums}}
****211.3 {{tl|Frame drums}}
***212 {{tl|Indirectly struck membranophones}}
**22 {{tl|Plucked membranophones}}
***221 {{tl|Frame plucked membranophones}}
***222 {{tl|Comb plucked membranophones}}
**23 {{tl|Friction membranophones}}
***231 {{tl|Stick friction membranophones}}
***232 {{tl|Chord friction membranophones}}
***233 {{tl|Hand friction membranophones}}
**24 {{tl|Blown membranophones}}
***241 {{tl|Free blown membranophones}}
***241 {{tl|Vessel blown membranophones}}
*3 {{tl|Chordophones}}
**31 {{tl|Simple chordophones}} ({{tl|Zithers}})
***311 {{tl|Bar or stick zithers}}
***312 {{tl|Tube zithers}}
***313 {{tl|Raft zithers}}
***314 {{tl|Board zithers}}
***315 {{tl|Trough zithers}}
***316 {{tl|Frame zithers}}
**32 {{tl|Composite chordophones}}
***321 {{tl|Lutes}}
***322 {{tl|Harps}}
***323 {{tl|Harp lutes}}
*4 {{tl|Aerophones}}
**41 {{tl|Free aerophones}}
***411 {{tl|Displacement aerophones}}
***412 {{tl|Interruptive aerophones}}
****412.132 Sets of free reeds {{tl|Squeezebox}}
***413 {{tl|Plosive aerophones}}
**42 {{tl|Non-free aerophones}}
***421 {{tl|Flutes}}
****421.121.12 {{tl|Western concert flutes}}
****421.221.11 {{tl|Whistles}}
***422 {{tl|Reed aerophones}}
****422.1 {{tl|Double reed}}
****422.2 {{tl|Single reeds}}
****422.3 {{tl|Free reeds}}
***423 {{tl|Brass aerophones}}
****423.1 {{tl|Natural brass aerophones}}
****423.2 {{tl|Chromatic brass aerophones}}
*5 {{tl|Electrophones}}
*{{tl|HS number}}
*See also: {{tl|Elemental organology}} ({{tl|Crystallophones}}, <nowiki>{{</nowiki>[[Template:Water instruments|Hydraulophones]]<nowiki>}}</nowiki>)
{{Div col end}}<includeonly>}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Hidden|header=Hornbostel-Sachs musical instrument templates ({{navbar|Template:Musical instrument templates|plain=1}})|content=</includeonly><noinclude>{{pad|4em}}'''Hornbostel-Sachs musical instrument templates'''
</noinclude>{{div col|colwidth=20em}}
*{{tl|Musical instruments}}
*{{tl|Hornbostel-Sachs}}
*1 {{tl|Idiophones}}
**11 {{tl|Struck idiophones}}
***111 {{tl|Directly struck idiophones}}
****111.1 {{tl|Concussion idiophones}}
****111.2 {{tl|Percussion idiophones}}
*****111.21 {{tl|Stick percussion idiophones}}
*****111.22 {{tl|Plaque percussion idiophones}} ({{tl|Lithophones}})
***112 {{tl|Indirectly struck idiophones}}
****112.1 {{tl|Shaken idiophones}}
****112.2 {{tl|Scraped idiophones}}
**12 {{tl|Plucked idiophones}}
**13 {{tl|Friction idiophones}}
**14 {{tl|Blown idiophones}}
*2 {{tl|Membranophones}}
**21 {{tl|Struck membranophones}}
***211 {{tl|Directly struck membranophones}}
****211.1 {{tl|Kettle drums}}
****211.2 {{tl|Tubular drums}}
****211.3 {{tl|Frame drums}}
***212 {{tl|Indirectly struck membranophones}}
**22 {{tl|Plucked membranophones}}
***221 {{tl|Frame plucked membranophones}}
***222 {{tl|Comb plucked membranophones}}
**23 {{tl|Friction membranophones}}
***231 {{tl|Stick friction membranophones}}
***232 {{tl|Chord friction membranophones}}
***233 {{tl|Hand friction membranophones}}
**24 {{tl|Blown membranophones}}
***241 {{tl|Free blown membranophones}}
***241 {{tl|Vessel blown membranophones}}
*3 {{tl|Chordophones}}
**31 {{tl|Simple chordophones}} ({{tl|Zithers}})
***311 {{tl|Bar or stick zithers}}
***312 {{tl|Tube zithers}}
***313 {{tl|Raft zithers}}
***314 {{tl|Board zithers}}
***315 {{tl|Trough zithers}}
***316 {{tl|Frame zithers}}
**32 {{tl|Composite chordophones}}
***321 {{tl|Lutes}}
***322 {{tl|Harps}}
***323 {{tl|Harp lutes}}
*4 {{tl|Aerophones}}
**41 {{tl|Free aerophones}}
***411 {{tl|Displacement aerophones}}
***412 {{tl|Interruptive aerophones}}
****412.132 Sets of free reeds {{tl|Squeezebox}}
***413 {{tl|Plosive aerophones}}
**42 {{tl|Non-free aerophones}}
***421 {{tl|Flutes}}
****421.121.12 {{tl|Western concert flutes}}
****421.221.11 {{tl|Whistles}}
***422 {{tl|Reed aerophones}}
****422.1 {{tl|Double reed}}
****422.2 {{tl|Single reeds}}
****422.3 {{tl|Free reeds}}
***423 {{tl|Brass aerophones}}
****423.1 {{tl|Natural brass aerophones}}
****423.2 {{tl|Chromatic brass aerophones}}
*5 {{tl|Electrophones}}
*{{tl|HS number}}
*See also: {{tl|Elemental organology}} ({{tl|Crystallophones}}, <nowiki>{{</nowiki>[[Template:Water instruments|Hydraulophones]]<nowiki>}}</nowiki>)
{{Div col end}}<includeonly>}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23515111839|commit triggered pipeline]]

***111 {{tl|Directly struck idiophones}}

****111.2 {{tl|Percussion idiophones}}
*****111.21 {{tl|Stick percussion idiophones}}

****211.3 {{tl|Frame drums}}

***311 {{tl|Bar or stick zithers}}
***312 {{tl|Tube zithers}}
***313 {{tl|Raft zithers}}

***315 {{tl|Trough zithers}}
***316 {{tl|Frame zithers}}
